blockingIssues.description: Added tests remain store-centric and do not instantiate DashboardQuickSwitchView or assert actionable load-error UI controls (Retry/Open Settings), leaving VAL-DASH-004 contract coverage unresolved.

Tests still do not assert DashboardQuickSwitchView accessibility announcement outputs for failure/success/recovery transitions; they rely on comments and store assertions, so VAL-DASH-008 coverage remains incomplete.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require view-surface assertions for dashboard error/accessibility fixes (instantiate DashboardQuickSwitchView and assert rendered recovery controls or announcement outputs), not store-only proxies.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fast-surfaces-add-dashboard-error-ui-render-tests and fast-surfaces-fix-dashboard-switch-failure-a11y-announcement still fail because new tests validate data-layer behavior rather than UI rendering/announcement behavior.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce manual UI sanity-check evidence in handoffs before followedProcedure can be true.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both failing fast-surfaces switcher-ui fix handoffs reported followedProcedure=true with no interactiveChecks evidence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten required-context enforcement so omission of mandated reads (for example .factory/library/user-testing.md) blocks followedProcedure=true.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The passed fix review for fast-surfaces-fix-backfillscheduler-idempotent-backward-check still observed missing evidence of a required context read from the skill checklist.

rejectedObservations.observation: Require full 40-char SHA in handoff commitId.
Add timestamp-precision note to shared knowledge immediately.
